Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Riggs, Esq. of Katzoff & Riggs, 510-588-5173 for defendant and moving party Monte Largo Vinyards & Winery
Court Call Appearance:David Riegels, Esq of Riegels, Campos & Kenyon, 916-779-7100 for plaintiff and opposing party Wilbur-Ellis Co.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT MONTE LAGO VINEYARDS & WINERY, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue to Lake County IS DENIED. PAYMENT UNDER THE CONTRACT WHICH WAS AT LEAST IN SUBSTANTIAL PART FOR SALES OF GOODS WAS TO BE PERFORMED IN SAN FRANCISCO. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
